testcase.name: test_remove_member_from_group
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_management.py:86: in test_remove_member_from_group assert approve_res.status_code == 200, f"Approval failed: {approve_res.text}" E AssertionError: Approval failed: {"detail":"User not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_move_member_between_groups
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_management.py:155: in test_move_member_between_groups assert move_res.status_code == 200, f"Move failed: {move_res.text}" E AssertionError: Move failed: {"detail":"User not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_remove_user_not_in_group
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_management.py:267: in test_remove_user_not_in_group assert remove_res.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {remove_res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 404 E assert 404 == 400 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_join_another_group
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_management.py:333: in test_join_another_group assert join_res.status_code == 200, f"Join failed: {join_res.text}" E AssertionError: Join failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
